title: Kyle Sandilands Expected To Launch Legal Action After $100 Million Contract Canned | 10 News+
description: “The biggest media legal battle so far this century,” that's how an industry veteran has described the fight brewing between broadcaster Kyle Sandilands and radio bosses at ARN. The shock jock is poised to launch legal action after he was sacked for serious misconduct, in a bid to claw back what was left of his 100 million dollar contract. title: Australian Woman Creates 2,682 Personalities To Protect Her From Abuse | 10 News+
description: You've probably heard of people who have multiple personalities; the term for it now is Dissociative Identity Disorder, and the woman you're about to meet has more than 2,500 different personalities. Jeni Haynes created them to protect her from the horrific abuse she suffered during her childhood, and in a world first, an Australian court heard and accepted evidence from six of those identities, which led to her father being sentenced to 45 years in prison. title: Israel Strikes, Destroys Beirut Apartment Building, Residents Flee | 10 News
description: Israeli air strikes have destroyed an apartment block in central Beirut, the latest in a string of wanton strikes across the Lebanon capital.  Vision shows the building collapsing after being hit, with residents reportedly given just one hour's notice to evacuate. Israel has reportedly struck similar targets across Beirut, with civilians either given short - or no - notice prior.  The block has been the subject of repeated Israeli strikes, with officials claiming without proof that Hezbollah has used the building to store "millions of dollars intended to finance its activities." title: Diesel Hits 329.0 Cents Per Litre In Rural Australia As Fuel Crisis Grows | 10 News
description: The growing petrol crisis in Australia has forced the price of diesel up to an eye-watering 329.0 cents in parts of rural South Australia.  Vision confirmed by 10 News in Border Village, on the remote South Australia/Western Australia border, shows the price diesel was being sold for early on Thursday morning at the remote petrol station. The sky high price meant that 260 litres of diesel costs a staggering $855,40. title: Real Possum Found In Airport Toy Store | 10 News
description: One of these things is not like the other.   A cheeky possum has found itself among fellow Aussie friends after getting lost in Hobart airport.  The Tassie local was spotted in the animal plushie section of the retail store, playing it cool next to its marsupial cousin the kangaroo.   The possum was safely relocated out of the terminal, and the space was thoroughly cleaned.
